notes: v0.13.3 — SETTINGS page rebuilt as Categories Tab layout (the mockup picked): left column with 4 category tabs (AUDIO / DISPLAY / CONTROLS / ACCOUNT), each with a procedural icon; right column with cinematic detail panel showing the active category. Audio = volume + beat-offset sliders. Display = fullscreen + bloom toggles + crosshair size + live preview. Controls = keybind reference. Account = nickname edit + Steam status. Windows only.
